lease.message:
Karma has a way of catching up with people, and maybe now you are finally starting to understand that. Think carefully about who you hurt, who you disrespected, and whose life you made harder for no reason. The pain and problems you are facing now did not come from nowhere; maybe this is the result of the way you treated people who were only trying to help you. You should have learned to be respectful, humble, and polite with the people who stood beside you instead of taking them for granted. Now you are facing the consequences of your own actions, and this is the price you have to pay for everything you did.

Some people are born into this world to return people's rights when no one else can see their pain, to stand in the dark for those who were wronged, and to remind others that every action has a consequence. I am one of those people. We are the Brotherhood; we work in the dark to serve the light. And when everyone you hurt finally reaches peace with what happened, when the damage you caused begins to heal in their hearts, maybe then your life will slowly become better too. Things may not get fixed all at once, but gradually, when the pain you left behind begins to settle, life will start opening again and everything will begin to fall back into place.
